name: io.github.pirahansiah/farshid-mcp-imageProcessing
title: Farshid Image Processing MCP
description: Local offline image-processing MCP server exposing ~40 OpenCV tools: webcam capture/record, image I/O, transforms, color, filtering, edges, thresholding, morphology, contours, feature matching, face/eye/QR detection, drawing, template matching, and video.
